ScorerSpecFile.description: YAML spec file for creating an agent scorer definition via `sf agent scorer create --spec <file>`.

apiName.description: API name of the scorer definition. Max 35 characters, must start with a letter, only alphanumerics and underscores.

dataType.description: Data type produced by the scorer. Use 'Text' for categorical labels, 'Number' for numeric scales, 'LightningType' for open-ended evaluations.

scorerType.description: Set to 'OpenEnded' when dataType is 'LightningType' for free-form evaluation.

lightningType.description: Required when dataType is 'LightningType'. Specifies the lightning type for open-ended values.

semanticType.description: How this scorer is used in analytics. 'Dimension' for categorical grouping, 'Measurement' for numeric aggregation.

inputScope.description: Whether the scorer evaluates an entire session or a single intent within a session.

label.description: Display label for the scorer version.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this scorer evaluates.

engineType.description: 'Manual' for human-evaluated scoring, 'PromptTemplate' for LLM-evaluated scoring.

promptContent.description: Prompt text for PromptTemplate engine type. Use {!$Input:Session} to reference the session data, {!$Input:AllowedLabels} for allowed output values, and {!$Input:FallbackLabel} for the fallback value. Ignored when engineType is 'Manual'.

promptTemplateName.description: API name of an existing prompt template to use instead of generating a new one. Mutually exclusive with promptContent.

status.description: Initial status of the scorer version.

outputEnumValues.description: Output value definitions. Required for 'Text' dataType. For 'Text' scorers, exactly one value must have isFallback: true.

specification.description: Required when dataType is 'Number'. Defines the numeric scale.

AgentAssociation.description: Associates the scorer with an agent in the org.

agentApiName.description: API name of the agent to associate with this scorer.

isActive.description: Whether scoring is active for this agent association.

samplingRate.description: Fraction of sessions to score (0.0 to 1.0). Only relevant when isActive is true.

inputScope.description: Override input scope for this specific agent association.

OutputEnumValue.description: A possible output value for the scorer.

outcomeType.description: Maps this value to a pass/fail outcome for reporting.

isFallback.description: Whether this is the fallback value. Exactly one value must be the fallback for Text scorers.

isSystemFallback.description: Whether this is a system-generated fallback. Typically false for user-defined scorers.

valueSpecification.description: Defines the numeric scale. The number of generated values ((max - min) / step + 1) must not exceed 101.

max.description: Maximum value of the scale. Must be greater than min.

threshold.description: Optional threshold value (must be between min and max).
